# Remote Process Dictionary Keys

**API Collection**

Used to extract information from dictionaries with entries that describe remote processes.

## Constants

- **kAERemoteProcessURLKey**: Use this key to obtain the full URL to the remote process, as a `CFURLRef`.
- **kAERemoteProcessNameKey**: Use this key to obtain the visible name of the remote process, in the localization supplied by the server, as a `CFStringRef`.
- **kAERemoteProcessUserIDKey**: Use this key to obtain the user ID of the remote process, if available; if so, returned as a `CFNumberRef`.
- **kAERemoteProcessProcessIDKey**: Use this key to obtain the process ID of the remote process, if available; if so, returned as a `CFNumberRef`.
